articles.summary: OpenAI's first device is set to be a smart speaker that lets you talk with ChatGPT, according to a report from Bloomberg . The device apparently won't have a screen, but will use a camera and additional sensors to "understand" your environment. OpenAI, in a new statement on Tuesday , said that it is "not aware of any evidence that this complaint has merit." Sources…
